content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Meridian Health Systems
Customer ID: C001
Contract ID: K013
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Period: H1 2024 (January – June 2024)
Meeting Date: July 16, 2024
Attendees: Sarah Chen (AE), Dr. Linda Forsythe (Director of Clinical Operations), Dr. Marcus Hill (CMO), Kevin Marsh (IT Coordinator)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Meridian's third facility opened on schedule in March 2024. Patient volume across all three facilities is up 18% year over year — the strongest growth in five years. The clinical operations team expanded to 38 staff members across all facilities.

PLATFORM USAGE
35 of 35 licensed users active — 100% activation rate for the first time since launch. Third facility team was fully onboarded within three weeks of go-live. Weekly report generation now at 74 reports per week. 19 custom dashboards in active use.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- 100% user activation celebrated as a milestone — Dr. Forsythe credited the onboarding training refresher conducted in October 2023
- EHR integration discussion with Dr. Hill: the API integration module entered beta in Q2 2024. Sarah Chen confirmed Meridian's EHR vendor is on the compatibility list. A technical scoping session with our solutions engineer is being arranged
- Dr. Hill expressed strong strategic interest in EHR integration — described it as potentially transforming InsightIQ from a reporting tool into a real-time clinical operations platform
- Kevin Marsh confirmed HIPAA audit logging documentation satisfied their compliance team

SATISFACTION RATING: 5/5
Dr. Forsythe: "Three facilities, 100% adoption, and the EHR integration on the horizon. This is exactly where we hoped to be."

ACTION ITEMS
- Sarah Chen to arrange EHR integration technical scoping session by August 2024
- Kevin Marsh to prepare internal IT requirements document for EHR integration
- Monitor for potential user expansion as third facility grows — Dr. Forsythe expects to need 5 more users by year end

NEXT QBR: January 2025
